LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT MORRIS PRODUCTS, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. THE ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. =(302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-04-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Morris Products, Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS PRODUCTS, INC.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff John Moore's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Morris Products, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed in open court. (see order and judgment for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
